content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch encode/encode_ordinary possibly. Let me know if you're touching core.py too.

agent2: ack. My diff only touches the encode() signature+docstring+first few lines of the body. Should be a small, mergeable diff - go ahead and add your return_positions param; if you can add it after my transformers block (or rebase off my change) we should avoid clobbering.
